name: Document Summarizer AI Agent
description: Ingests documents (PDF, DOCX, TXT), extracts text, chunks intelligently, and produces structured summaries in multiple formats (TL;DR, Bullet Points, Executive Summary, Section-wise, Action Items, Q&A).
weftCode:
# Project: Document Summarizer AI Agent
# Description: Ingests documents (PDF, DOCX, TXT), extracts text, chunks intelligently, and produces structured summaries in multiple formats (TL;DR, Bullet Points, Executive Summary, Section-wise, Action Items, Q&A).

# --- Inputs ---

doc_input = Document {
  label: "Upload Document"
  media: {
    "file_id": "58014e4e-60cc-4152-9e09-deb5257429dc",
    "url": "https://api.weavemind.co/api/v1/files/58014e4e-60cc-4152-9e09-deb5257429dc",
    "filename": "1q4Qz9eTsuPVc_tElRVMCdjgO0y_G1e3Y.pdf",
    "mime_type": "application/pdf",
    "size_bytes": 1240728
  }
}

summary_format = Text {
  label: "Summary Format"
  value: "tldr"
}

user_question = Text {
  label: "Q&A Question (optional)"
  value: ""
}

# --- Text Extraction ---

text_extractor = ExecPython(document: Document) -> (text: String, page_count: Number, filename: String) {
  label: "Extract Text"
  dependencies: ```
PyMuPDF==1.25.4
python-docx==1.1.2
  ```
  code: ```
import fitz
import docx
import io
import urllib.request

url = document["url"]
filename = document.get("filename", "unknown")
mime = document.get("mimeType", "")

# Download the file
req = urllib.request.Request(url)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
    file_bytes = resp.read()

text = ""
page_count = 1

if mime == "application/pdf" or filename.lower().endswith(".pdf"):
    doc = fitz.open(stream=file_bytes, filetype="pdf")
    page_count = len(doc)
    pages = []
    for page in doc:
        pages.append(page.get_text())
    text = "\n\n".join(pages)
    doc.close()

elif mime in ("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document",) or filename.lower().endswith(".docx"):
    doc = docx.Document(io.BytesIO(file_bytes))
    paragraphs = [p.text for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]
    text = "\n\n".join(paragraphs)
    page_count = max(1, len(text) // 3000)

elif mime == "text/plain" or filename.lower().endswith(".txt"):
    text = file_bytes.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    page_count = max(1, len(text) // 3000)

else:
    text = file_bytes.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    page_count = max(1, len(text) // 3000)

if not text.strip():
    raise ValueError(f"Could not extract text from {filename}. The document may be scanned/image-based.")

return {"text": text, "page_count": page_count, "filename": filename}
  ```
}
text_extractor.document = doc_input.value

# --- Chunking ---

chunker = ExecPython(text: String, page_count: Number) -> (chunks: List[String], strategy: String) {
  label: "Chunk Text"
  code: ```
if page_count <= 10:
    strategy = "stuff"
    return {"chunks": [text], "strategy": strategy}

chunk_size = 3000
overlap = 450
strategy = "map_reduce" if page_count <= 50 else "hierarchical"

chunks = []
start = 0
while start < len(text):
    end = start + chunk_size
    chunk = text[start:end]
    if chunk.strip():
        chunks.append(chunk.strip())
    start = end - overlap

if not chunks:
    chunks = [text]

return {"chunks": chunks, "strategy": strategy}
  ```
}
chunker.text = text_extractor.text
chunker.page_count = text_extractor.page_count

# --- Summarization ---

summarize = Group(
  chunks: List[String],
  strategy: String,
  format: String,
  question: String,
  filename: String
) -> (summary: String) {
  # Routes to stuff or map-reduce strategy, applies format-specific prompts

  # --- Build the format-specific prompt instruction ---
  format_prompt = ExecPython(format: String, question: String) -> (instruction: String) {
    label: "Format Prompt"
    code: ```
prompts = {
    "tldr": "Summarize the following document in exactly 2-3 sentences. Be concise and capture only the most critical points.",
    "bullet_points": "Extract the 10 most important takeaways from the document. Format as a numbered bullet list. Be specific, avoid vague statements.",
    "executive_summary": "Write a formal executive summary of this document. Include: purpose, key findings, recommendations, and conclusion. Max 300 words.",
    "section_wise": "Summarize each section of this document separately. Use the section heading as the label. Keep each section summary under 100 words.",
    "action_items": "Extract all tasks, decisions, deadlines, and responsibilities mentioned in this document. Format as a checklist with checkboxes.",
    "qa": f"Using only the content of this document, answer the following question clearly and concisely: {question}"
}
instruction = prompts.get(format, prompts["tldr"])
return {"instruction": instruction}
    ```
  }
  format_prompt.format = self.format
  format_prompt.question = self.question

  # --- Route by strategy ---
  router = ExecPython(strategy: String, chunks: List[String]) -> (
    stuff_text: String?,
    mr_chunks: List[String]?
  ) {
    label: "Route Strategy"
    code: ```
if strategy == "stuff":
    return {"stuff_text": chunks[0], "mr_chunks": None}
else:
    return {"stuff_text": None, "mr_chunks": chunks}
    ```
  }
  router.strategy = self.strategy
  router.chunks = self.chunks

  # --- STUFF path (small docs) ---
  stuff_prompt = Template {
    label: "Stuff Prompt"
    template: ```
{{instruction}}

Document ({{filename}}):
---
{{doc_text}}
---

Provide your summary now.
    ```
  }
  stuff_prompt.instruction = format_prompt.instruction
  stuff_prompt.filename = self.filename
  stuff_prompt.doc_text = router.stuff_text

  stuff_llm = LlmInference -> (response: String) {
    label: "Stuff Summarize"
    model: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6"
    temperature: "0.3"
    maxTokens: "4096"
  }
  stuff_llm.prompt = stuff_prompt.text

  # --- MAP-REDUCE path (medium/large docs) ---
  # Wrapped in a sub-group so expand/gather depth is well-defined.
  # When mr_chunks is null, this entire group skips via null propagation.
  map_reduce = Group(
    chunks: List[String],
    instruction: String,
    filename: String
  ) -> (summary: String) {
    # Map-reduce summarization: summarize each chunk in parallel, then combine

    map_prompt = Template(chunk: String) {
      label: "Map Prompt"
      template: ```
Summarize the following section of a document. Capture all key points, facts, and details. Be thorough but concise.

Section:
---
{{chunk}}
---
      ```
    }
    map_prompt.chunk = self.chunks


    map_llm = LlmInference -> (response: String) {
      label: "Map Summarize"
      model: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6"
      temperature: "0.3"
      maxTokens: "2048"
    }
    map_llm.prompt = map_prompt.text

    collect_summaries = ExecPython(summaries: List[String | Null]) -> (combined: String) {
      label: "Collect Summaries"
      code: ```
valid = [s for s in summaries if s is not None]
combined = "\n\n---\n\n".join(valid)
return {"combined": combined}
      ```
    }
    collect_summaries.summaries = map_llm.response

    reduce_prompt = Template {
      label: "Reduce Prompt"
      template: ```
{{instruction}}

The following are summaries of individual sections from the document "{{filename}}". Combine them into a single coherent summary following the instruction above.

Section Summaries:
---
{{combined_summaries}}
---

Provide your final summary now.
      ```
    }
    reduce_prompt.instruction = self.instruction
    reduce_prompt.filename = self.filename
    reduce_prompt.combined_summaries = collect_summaries.combined

    reduce_llm = LlmInference -> (response: String) {
      label: "Reduce Summarize"
      model: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6"
      temperature: "0.3"
      maxTokens: "4096"
    }
    reduce_llm.prompt = reduce_prompt.text

    self.summary = reduce_llm.response
  }
  map_reduce.chunks = router.mr_chunks
  map_reduce.instruction = format_prompt.instruction
  map_reduce.filename = self.filename

  # --- Merge results from both paths ---
  merge = ExecPython(stuff_result: String?, reduce_result: String?, @require_one_of(stuff_result, reduce_result)) -> (summary: String) {

    label: "Merge Results"
    code: ```
if stuff_result is not None:
    return {"summary": stuff_result}
elif reduce_result is not None:
    return {"summary": reduce_result}
else:
    return {"summary": "Error: No summary was generated."}
    ```
  }
  merge.stuff_result = stuff_llm.response
  merge.reduce_result = map_reduce.summary

  self.summary = merge.summary
}

summarize.chunks = chunker.chunks
summarize.strategy = chunker.strategy
summarize.format = summary_format.value
summarize.question = user_question.value
summarize.filename = text_extractor.filename

# --- Output ---

output = Debug {
  label: "Summary Output"
}
output.data = summarize.summary
